description: Composition Pink and blue striped shirt made of 100% cotton, has full roll-up sleeves with a mid-arm tab, a pointed collar, embroidered logo on the left chest and a curved hem Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash in warm water with like colours only, using a mild detergent Do not bleach Dry in shade Do not iron Bright shirt from spykar for the man who dares to experiment with his style. Wear this bright piece with a vibrant scarf and blue jeans to bring out the shocking pink to optimal effect. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and chest 35"
